description: CompositionDark indigo streaked jeans made of a cotton and lycra blend fabric for stretchability, has two insert pockets on the front with a patch pocket inside the right one, two patch pockets on the back with thread detailing, brand badge on the right pocket at the back, loops on the waist, and has a metal zipper and button closureFitRegular fit Mid rise Straight legWash careTurn inside out before washing and dryingMachine wash cold separately using a mild detergent as colour may bleedDo not bleach or wringTumble dry or dry flat in shadeWarm ironIf you're a denim person, then these dark indigo blue streaked jeans from wrangler are perfect for you. With a mid waist and great regular fit, this pair looks on trend and stays comfortable all day. Team this with semi-formal shirts and suede boots or funky t-shirts and canvas shoes for unparalleled cool.Model statisticsThe model wears jeans of length 44"Height: 6', Waist: 32", Hips: 40"
